content.speakerText: Hi there! You're the new neighbor, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！你是新搬来的邻居吧？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I just moved in last week. Nice to meet you!
Yes, I'm Alex. Hope I'm not disturbing anyone!
Yep! I'm Jamie. Looking forward to getting to know everyone.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认自己是新邻居
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，如使用了 'Nice to meet you' 等恰当表达
表达自然度：语气是否轻松友好，符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'new neighbor', 'moved in', 'meet' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I'm Lisa. Welcome to the building!
expectedAnswers: Thanks, Lisa! I'm really excited to be here.
That's so kind of you! I'm Taylor.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否对欢迎表示感谢并回应身份
语言准确性：是否正确使用了感谢表达和人名
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、口语化，避免生硬或机械
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'welcome', 'I'm' 等核心表达

content.speakerText: Hey, I'm your neighbor on the 3rd floor. I noticed you're moving in — need any help?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，我是三楼的邻居，看到你在搬东西，需要帮忙吗？
expectedAnswers: Oh, thanks so much! I'm Sam. I think I'm okay for now, but I'll let you know if I need a hand!
That's really kind of you! I'm Alex. I appreciate the offer!
Hi! I'm Jamie. Not right now, but I'll definitely take you up on that later!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应帮助提议并自我介绍
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的感谢语和委婉表达（如 'I'll let you know'）
表达自然度：语气是否真诚、不生硬，符合邻里间自然互动
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'thanks', 'help', 'I'm', 'appreciate' 等社交关键词
